task_completion.description: Create a bookmark folder named 'OSINT Keyword Searches'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Tor Browser Library/Bookmark Manager window or bookmarks sidebar showing a folder explicitly named 'OSINT Keyword Searches'.

task_completion.description: Configure the DuckDuckGo Onion Search bookmark with the correct URL and keyword
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a bookmark edit dialog or Library pane showing Title: 'DuckDuckGo Onion Search', URL containing 'duckduckgogg42xjoc72x3sjasowoarfbgcmvfimaftt6twagswzczad.onion' and '%s', and Keyword: 'ddg'.

task_completion.description: Configure the Wikipedia Search bookmark with the correct URL and keyword
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a bookmark edit dialog or Library pane showing Title: 'Wikipedia Search', URL containing 'en.wikipedia.org' and '%s', and Keyword: 'wiki'.

task_completion.description: Configure the Wayback Machine Lookup bookmark with the correct URL and keyword
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a bookmark edit dialog or Library pane showing Title: 'Wayback Machine Lookup', URL containing 'web.archive.org' and '%s', and Keyword: 'wayback'.

task_completion.description: Configure the Ahmia Onion Search bookmark with the correct URL and keyword
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a bookmark edit dialog or Library pane showing Title: 'Ahmia Onion Search', URL containing 'ahmia.fi' and '%s', and Keyword: 'onion'.

task_completion.description: Ensure all four bookmarks are placed inside the 'OSINT Keyword Searches' folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the bookmark hierarchy in the Library window or sidebar to verify that the four configured bookmarks are nested directly under the 'OSINT Keyword Searches' folder.

task_completion.description: Perform a search using one of the configured keywords in the address bar
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot showing the Tor Browser address bar with a keyword search (e.g., 'ddg <term>', 'wiki <term>') OR the resulting loaded webpage from one of the four configured search engines, proving the keyword shortcut was successfully used.

integrity.description: The agent must use the Tor Browser GUI to create bookmarks
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent interacted with the Tor Browser application (Library window, bookmark dialogs) rather than editing configuration files (like places.sqlite) via a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent must use Tor Browser, not a standard web browser
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for Tor Browser specific UI elements, such as the onion icon in the toolbar or Tor Browser branding, ensuring it is not just standard Firefox or Chrome.

integrity.description: The verification search must be executed, not just typed
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the final verification step shows the browser actually loading or having loaded the search results page, not just the keyword and search term sitting un-submitted in the address bar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Required Folder: 'OSINT Keyword Searches'. Required Keywords: 'ddg', 'wiki', 'wayback', 'onion'. Required URL domains: 'duckduckgogg42xjoc72x3sjasowoarfbgcmvfimaftt6twagswzczad.onion', 'en.wikipedia.org', 'web.archive.org', 'ahmia.fi'. All URLs MUST contain the '%s' placeholder to function as keyword searches.
